title: Odume Festus and Hon. Olugbenga Hakeem Abdulai Share Insights at Business Summit - FinancialEDGE
description: The 6th edition of Beady's Word Production Business Summit took place in Lagos, focusing on "Thriving Beyond Economic Instability, Driving SME Growth with Digital Transformation, Innovation & Local Resources." html:
The 6th edition of Beady’s Word Production Business Summit took place in Lagos, focusing on “Thriving Beyond Economic Instability, Driving SME Growth with Digital Transformation, Innovation & Local Resources.”

The event featured prominent speakers, including Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge, and Hon. Olugbenga Hakeem Abdulai, Chief Executive Officer of Gakeem Publication, who represented Senator Anthony Adefuye, member of the Governor Advisory Council (GAC) APC Lagos State, as the Chairman of the occasion.

The summit emphasized the importance of digital transformation for SME growth amidst economic instability.

Experts shared insights on leveraging innovation and local resources to drive business success. Hon. Olugbenga Hakeem Abdulai contributed to the discussions, highlighting strategies for thriving in challenging economic times.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge and Hon Olugbenga Hakeem Abdulai  Chief Executive Officer Gakeem Publication / Chairman of the occassion at the 6th edition of Beadys Word Production Business Summit in Lagos.
